description: Government warning capitalization differs from the required exact statement while ordinary fields remain clean and readable.

covers.frontend_upload: Verify the review form accepts a PNG upload and submits it as multipart form data.
covers.backend_ingest_and_preprocess: Verify the backend reads image bytes and routes the upload through the OCR path without returning an empty-file error.
covers.ocr_extraction: Assert that OCR recovers the visible warning header text with title case rather than all caps.
covers.processing_and_validation: Assert that ordinary fields normalize successfully but the government warning fails exact-match validation.

expected_extracted_fields.producer: Bottled by Old Tom Distillery, Frankfort, KY
expected_extracted_fields.government_warning: Government Warning: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

application_data.producer: Bottled by Old Tom Distillery, Frankfort, KY
application_data.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
